name: Reese's Peanut Butter Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and peanut butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add brown sugar and mix to blend. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Alternately add this mixture with milk to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Stir in vanilla.
4. Pour batter into two greased and floured 9-inch cake pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F until done (about 45 minutes). Cool on wire racks to room temperature before frosting.
6. Spread half of the Peanut Butter Filling over the tops of each cake using a metal spatula dipped in hot water.
7. Spread the Chocolate Glaze over the cake while it is warm. As the glaze cools, it will thicken.
Peanut Butter Filling:
1 cup cream cheese, softened
1/2 cup creamy peanut butter
Chocolate Glaze:
1/2 cup water
4 tablespoons unsalted butter
1/2 cup cocoa, sifted
1 cup powdered sugar, unsifted
1 teaspoon vanilla
